_description: SAFETY DEVICE - This file documents the complete firmware configuration required for the Secondary Shelly. The deploy script applies these settings via RPC.

input:0.name: SW1 Secondary Sense
input:0._comment: Senses secondary contactor output - HIGH means BOTH contactors ON

input:1.name: SW2 Primary Sense
input:1._comment: Senses primary contactor output - HIGH means Primary is ON

switch:0.name: Safety Contactor
switch:0._comment: CRITICAL SAFETY: Must default OFF. Auto-off at 61 min is firmware backup.

script:1.name: Secondary Safety Logic
script:1._comment: Safety script with independent timer and weld detection

initial_state_off.description: Relay defaults to OFF on power loss

firmware_auto_off.description: Firmware cuts power after 61 minutes regardless of script

weld_detection.description: Script detects welded contactor if SW2 stays HIGH > 65 min

feedback_verification.description: Script verifies SW1 goes HIGH within 1 second of engaging relay
